name: Maraurn'Zol
abilities:
A glass cannon that strikes from anywhere. On a GRID ROLL (both axes random — she can't aim) she lands and hits EVERY hero within her large sight (7), hard (⚔9) and THROUGH walls and objects. Her reach also applies to the grid roll, so she hits everyone within her blast radius of the landing too.

x◆: +1 grid roll for every 4 objectives.
2◆: Blast radius 1.
4◆: Blast radius 2.
7◆: Blast radius 3.

If she MOVES instead, she makes only a weak melee strike (⚔4, reach 1). Easy to shove back (🛡0) — the only safety is out of her sight.
objectiveAbilities:
6◇: Add a copy of Maraurn'Zol (✚ Clone button). It takes its own grid-roll attack after her, with the same blast radius, and can't be killed — only shoved.

9◇: Take one extra grid-roll attack; every hero not behind a full wall is hit.

name: The Fog
abilities:
It has NO grid roll — it never teleports. It rolls its big movement die (D20, +2, and faster later) and slides forward, striking every hero within reach as it rolls over them. Its reach grows 1 → 2 → 3, so once it out-reaches you it can't be pushed back — break line of sight or get indoors.

1◆: Reach 1 (strike 1 away).
4◆: Reach 2.
8◆: Reach 3.
2◆: +D4 to movement rolls.
4◆: +D4 to movement rolls.

Heroes inside a building are SAFE. Sight 6.
objectiveAbilities:
2◇: The Fog sees heroes through all objects — but still NOT through building walls.

9◇: Kill up to 2 heroes who are not inside a building.

name: Ghathag
abilities:
A stalker with NO grid roll — each move he steps toward the nearest hero and strikes at reach 1, hitting hard (⚔7, ⚔11 once enraged) and shrugging off pushes (🛡4, hard to shove). Sight 4, but only 1 while stalking — slip out of his lane and he loses you. He cannot enter buildings.

x◆: +1 move for every 4 objectives.
2◆: Step 3 spaces.
4◆: Step 3 more.
6◆: Step 3 more.
3◆: Place a barrier (🧱 button) — blocks movement and line of sight.
4◆: Enraged — permanent +4 attack (⚔11).
objectiveAbilities:
3◇: Place 2 barriers.
5◇: Place 2 barriers.
4◆: Barriers placed now have +3 life.
7◆: Barriers placed now have +3 more life.
9◇: Turn every barrier into a minion (roll each for its health).

name: Oblex
abilities:
Weak itself — its minions do the fighting. On a GRID ROLL it controls the COLUMN and rolls the row, then may swap places with any minion. It gets no extra grid rolls. Its own strike is weak (⚔4, sight 4); the danger is the swarm it drops in your face, and it is hard to slip away from (flee +1).

1◆: Summon 1 + 1 per 3 objectives (roll each 2+d4 for health).
3◆: Or give +2 attack to one minion.
5◆: All minions may move 2 spaces each turn.

Minion baseline ⚔3 / 🛡2 / ❤ 2+d4; the ladder buffs below apply to every minion automatically.
objectiveAbilities:
1◇: Summon 2 minions.
3◇: Summon 3 minions.
5◇: Summon 4 minions.
4◆: Every minion gets +2 attack (automatic).
6◆: Every minion gets +1 reach (automatic).
7◆: Every minion gets +2 attack (automatic).
9◇: Double the number of minions on the board.

name: Wyht, the Trickster
abilities:
A trickster who wins by disruption, not damage. On a GRID ROLL she CHOOSES a row or a column and rolls the other, blinking into position; a hero she passes in her sight (5) takes a weak hit (⚔4). She is easy to slip away from (flee -1).

x◆: +1 grid roll for every 3 objectives.
2◆: Relocate any 1 objective to a space you choose.
4◆: Every hero discards 1 card — or one hero of your choice discards 2.
6◆: Draw 2 monster cards, OR one hero of your choice discards down to 4 cards.
8◆: Swap the positions of two objectives, or add +1 to one objective's value.

Wyht draws an extra card whenever she draws.
objectiveAbilities:
1◇: Add 1 objective to the board (raises the heroes' goal).
3◇: Randomly relocate ALL objectives.
5◇: Add 1 objective to the board.
10◇: Choose a hero — they die.
